backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines a ContactMessage type, validates and stores submitted contact messages, and exposes submitContactMessage and getMessages endpoints.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines the ContactMessage type and provides a run function returning an empty initial messages state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to the frontend files and components involved, with confidence ratings and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing the purpose of components, hooks, and stylesheets in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the DataNex React app that mounts the root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections, implements a custom animated cursor, scroll progress tracking, active section detection, and a responsive navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component that renders a ProfileCard alongside animated text describing Jay Gohil's background, mission, and skill tags, using scroll-triggered visibility.
Generic wrapper component that uses IntersectionObserver to apply a fade-up animation when the section scrolls into view.
frontend/src/components/BlogPreview.tsx: Blog preview section displaying a featured post and two side posts with category tags, read times, and a 'View All Posts' button, animated on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: A contact form section that collects name, email, company, budget, service type, and message, then submits the data to the backend actor. Includes client-side validation, submission state management, and scroll-triggered reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/DataCounterDashb: Displays animated stat counters (records scraped, projects delivered, accuracy rate, industries served) that count up when scrolled into view using an easing animation.
An inline SVG illustration of a data pipeline showing animated nodes (Web Source → Scraper → Processor → Output) with flowing dashed arrows and pulsing indicators.
frontend/src/components/DataScopeEstimat: An interactive estimator tool where users configure website type, data volume, output format, and frequency to receive instant complexity, delivery time, and pricing estimates, with a CTA to scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/FAQAccordion.tsx: A filterable, searchable FAQ accordion component with category tabs and a text search input, rendering questions and answers that expand/collapse on click.
frontend/src/components/FloatingContactB: A fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner that toggles a small menu with email and phone contact links.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, service/technology/contact link columns, smooth-scroll navigation, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with an animated particle canvas background, typewriter effect, data pipeline SVG, and animated stat counters for records scraped, projects delivered, accuracy, and years of experience.
frontend/src/components/IndustriesSectio: Displays a grid of industry cards (AI, e-commerce, research, etc.) that the service targets, with scroll-triggered reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/LiveDataFeed.tsx: Simulates a live data collection feed table showing source URLs, record counts, status, and accuracy, with active record counts incrementing every 1.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware active section highlighting, smooth-scroll anchor links, and a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/PriceBreakdownCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart breaking down price estimate components by label, value, and color, with a total displayed at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/PricingCalculato: Interactive pricing calculator letting users select service type, duration, and add-ons to compute a total estimate, alongside three static pricing plan cards.
Displays three pricing tier cards (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) with features and CTA buttons that scroll to the contact section, with a scroll-triggered reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/ProcessSection.t: Renders a 5-step data collection process section with scroll-triggered reveal animations, displaying each step's icon, number, name, and description.
An enhanced process timeline component with expandable step details, deliverables, and timelines, supporting both desktop horizontal and mobile vertical layouts with scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/ProfileCard.tsx: Displays a founder profile card for Jay Gohil with stats (60+ projects, 2.4M+ records), platform links, and a 99.2% accuracy badge, animated on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ProjectGallery.t: A filterable project gallery showcasing 5+ data scraping case studies with code snippets, tech tags, and result highlights, using scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/ProjectModal.tsx: A modal overlay component that displays detailed project information including challenge, solution, outcome, result, and technologies used, with Escape key and backdrop close support.
frontend/src/components/QuickContactPill: A floating 'Get a Free Quote' pill button that appears after scrolling 300px and smoothly scrolls to the contact section on click.
frontend/src/components/ServicesShowcase: Renders a grid of 8 service cards (web scraping, lead gen, data cleaning, etc.) with icons and descriptions, with the last card highlighted as a custom solution CTA.
frontend/src/components/SkillsVisualizat: Displays animated skill bars grouped by category (Programming, Scraping Tools, Databases) alongside a terminal window and a tech stack icon grid with proficiency levels.
frontend/src/components/TechStackCompari: Renders a comparison of three web scraping technologies (Selenium, BeautifulSoup, Scrapy) with toggleable card and table views, showing features, pros, cons, and use cases for each.
frontend/src/components/TerminalWindow.t: Displays an animated terminal window that types out a Python web scraping script line by line with syntax-based coloring, then resets and loops after completion.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialCarou: Auto-advancing testimonial carousel with manual prev/next controls and dot navigation, displaying client quotes, metrics, and author details with a scroll-triggered reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/TypewriterEffect: Reusable typewriter component that cycles through an array of strings with configurable typing, deleting, and pause speeds, rendering a blinking cursor.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Section component listing five company differentiators alongside an animated accuracy counter that counts up to 99.2% on scroll visibility, with a CTA button that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, switching between anonymous and identity-authenticated actors and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCarousel.ts: Custom hook managing carousel state with auto-play, prev/next/goTo navigation, and touch swipe gesture handlers.
frontend/src/hooks/useCounterAnimation.t: Custom hook that animates a numeric value from 0 to a target over a configurable duration using a quartic ease-out function, triggered by a boolean flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: Custom React hook that tracks window scroll position and returns a parallax offset value scaled by a configurable speed factor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a visibility flag when a referenced DOM element scrolls into view, enabling scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for the navy/gold DataNex brand theme, typography (Playfair Display, Space Grotesk, Inter), and reusable component classes like buttons, cards, and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` (React Query) and `InternetIdentityProvider` for authentication context.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold color palettes, brand typography, border radii, box shadows, and named keyframe animations (fadeInUp, float, shimmer, etc.).
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the DataNex Research Solutions website (navy/gold single-page site for a data scraping agency), tracking schema version, architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements.
